description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a metallic, gold-toned finish and a sleek, angular profile. The frame and slide are predominantly metallic, with a black textured grip that appears ergonomic and contoured for comfort. The slide features a triangular green marking with additional small green details, possibly indicating a manufacturer or model insignia. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is long and extends slightly beyond the slide, with a smooth, unadorned exterior. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined silhouette.
description: A gold-toned semi-automatic handgun with a black textured grip, green triangular markings, and a long, smooth barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gold metallic slide, black grip, green triangular marking, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile, barrel alignment, and the width of the grip and slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the black grip, gold frame, and the absence of visible markings on this side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the barrel opening, front sight, and the overall width of the handgun.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is black, contoured, and appears to be made of a textured polymer or rubber material for enhanced ergonomics and secure handling. It features a subtle checkered or stippled pattern for improved traction, with a slight palm swell and finger grooves for comfort. The grip is integrated seamlessly into the frame, with no visible logos or embellishments, emphasizing functionality and a modern aesthetic.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a smooth curvature and moderate thickness. It is generously sized to accommodate gloved fingers and lacks any undercuts or squared-off edges. The surface is smooth, with no visible texturing or reinforcement, maintaining a clean and functional appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and straight, extending slightly beyond the slide, with a smooth, unadorned exterior. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the finish matches the gold metallic tone of the slide. The barrel profile is standard, with no fluting or external modifications.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features a prominent green triangular marking with additional small green details, possibly indicating a manufacturer logo or model insignia. These markings are located on the rear portion of the slide, above the grip, and are visually striking against the gold background. No other engravings, serial numbers, or caliber designations are visible.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and compact profile. There are no visible extensions, flares, or finger rests, and the surface appears smooth and untextured, blending seamlessly with the grip's design.
